user.title: Scrypted Advanced Notifier
user.description: Enter your Scrypted URL and the HA Secret from the Advanced Notifier plugin settings.

data_description.scrypted_url: Base URL of your Scrypted instance, including port (e.g. port 11080)

select_devices.title: Select devices
select_devices.description: Choose which Scrypted devices to import into Home Assistant.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Scrypted. Check the URL and that the plugin is running.
error.origin_not_allowed: This Home Assistant URL is not in the plugin's allowed origins. Add it to haAllowedOrigins in the plugin settings.

init.title: Scrypted Advanced Notifier
init.description: Choose what you want to configure.

manage_devices.title: Manage devices
manage_devices.description: Add or remove Scrypted devices imported into Home Assistant.

update_secret.title: Update HA Secret
update_secret.description: Update the shared secret used for communication with the Scrypted plugin. Copy the new value from the plugin settings.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Scrypted. The current device list is shown as fallback.
error.origin_not_allowed: This Home Assistant URL is not in the plugin's allowed origins.
